case_title: VARELAS, TRIANT vs. HERNANDEZ, JORGE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARELAS, TRIANT AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JORGE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

DECLARATION RE UNAVAILABILITY FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARELAS, TRIANT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VARELAS, TRIANT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JORGE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 15 RUSSIA ST #7, LEASE FORFEITED

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $140.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARELAS, TRIANT AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JORGE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VARELAS, TRIANT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JORGE $1,090.75 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,530.75, JUDGMENT INCLUDES
